heading: Postage allowance for Chaplain of Senate
label: 6653 Postage allowance for Chaplain of Senate
text: The Secretary of the Senate is authorized and directed to procure and furnish each fiscal year (commencing with the fiscal year ending ) to the Chaplain of the Senate, upon the request of the Chaplain of the Senate, United States postage stamps in such amounts as may be necessary for the mailing of postal matters arising in connection with his official business.September 30, 1982
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61d–2 of this title
